description_long: This tree features a tall, slender trunk with a slightly curved base, supporting a dense, rounded canopy composed of four prominent clusters of foliage. The foliage is characterized by a striking mix of deep brown and vibrant orange hues, giving the tree a dramatic, autumnal appearance. The canopy is relatively compact, with the leaf clusters arranged in a roughly symmetrical pattern around the trunk, leaving a small open space at the center. The trunk appears to be made of wood, with a rough texture and a natural taper from base to top. The foliage is bushy and irregular, suggesting a broadleaf type with a somewhat coarse surface. This tree would stand out in urban parks or along streets due to its unique coloration and bold canopy structure.
description: A tall tree with a curved wooden trunk and a dense, rounded canopy of deep brown and orange foliage, arranged in four prominent clusters. The dramatic autumnal colors and compact form make it visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full height of the tree, with the trunk straight and the four foliage clusters symmetrically arranged.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the pronounced curve of the trunk and the overlapping of the foliage clusters, emphasizing the tree's asymmetry.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the open central space in the canopy and the even distribution of the foliage clusters around the trunk.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the trunk's curvature and the dense, bushy nature of the foliage, with some clusters partially obscured.
